optionsPrivacyLine.message: Privacy: no browsing data leaves your device during cleanup.

optionsSaved.description: Transient status message after saving options.

optionsThanks.message: Thanks for using Klick Klean. Select the browsing data types this extension is allowed to clean:

optionsTitle.description: Legacy options title string retained for compatibility.

partialUnsupported.message: Some selected cleanup categories are not supported in this context.
partialUnsupported.description: Status message shown when part of requested cleanup is unsupported.

popupBackToReview.description: Button label to return from confirmation to review state.

popupCategoriesHeading.description: Heading for category checklist in popup.

popupConfirmBody.message: You selected categories that can remove sessions or close windows. Confirm to continue.
popupConfirmBody.description: Body text in destructive cleanup confirmation section.

popupConfirmHeading.description: Heading for destructive cleanup confirmation section in popup.

popupConfirmRiskLabel.message: I understand this may log me out or reset web app data.
popupConfirmRiskLabel.description: Label for the high-risk confirmation checkbox in popup.

popupConfirmRun.description: Button label to run cleanup after confirmation.

popupContinue.description: Label for popup cleanup confirmation button.

popupDocumentTitle.description: Document title for the popup page tab/window.

popupIncognitoNote.message: Incognito data can only be affected when this extension is enabled for incognito in chrome://extensions.
popupIncognitoNote.description: Popup note explaining incognito permission limitations.

popupNoWarning.description: Fallback warning list item when no category is selected in popup.

popupPermissionBody.message: Klick Klean only uses Chrome cleanup APIs for categories you choose. Cleanup runs locally in your browser and no browsing data is sent to external servers.
popupPermissionBody.description: Detailed permission and privacy rationale in popup.

popupPermissionSummary.description: Summary text for permission rationale disclosure in popup.

popupReportHeading.description: Heading for the cleanup results report section in popup.

reportCleaned.description: Report section heading for successfully cleaned categories.

reportSkipped.description: Report section heading for categories skipped due to unsupported scope.

reportNotApplicable.description: Report section heading for categories that were skipped or deprecated.

reportFailed.description: Report section heading for categories that failed to clean.

reportHonestyNote.message: Note: Chrome does not report exact deleted item counts. Categories listed as cleaned were selected for removal, but the extension cannot verify how many individual items were affected.
reportHonestyNote.description: Honesty disclaimer in the post-cleanup report explaining Chrome API limitations.

reportLimitationsHeading.description: Heading for the limitations section in the post-cleanup report.

limitationExcludeUnsupported.message: Allowlist cannot protect this category from global cleanup because Chrome does not support excluding origins for it.
limitationExcludeUnsupported.description: Limitation note shown when a selected category does not support excludeOrigins.

limitationScopeNeedsOrigin.message: Scoped cleanup requires a valid site origin. No valid origin was provided.
limitationScopeNeedsOrigin.description: Error message when scoped cleanup is requested without a valid origin.

warningScopedUnsupported.message: Some selected categories are only available for global cleanup and were skipped for this site.
warningScopedUnsupported.description: Warning shown when scoped cleanup is attempted for global-only categories.

privacyLegend.description: Legend for privacy and permissions section in options page.

privacyWhyTitle.message: Why does this extension need the browsingData permission?
privacyWhyTitle.description: Heading explaining why the browsingData permission is required.

privacyWhyBody.message: Klick Klean uses the Chrome browsingData API to remove the data types you select. Without this permission, the extension cannot delete any browsing data. The permission is only used when you explicitly trigger a cleanup action.
privacyWhyBody.description: Explanation of why the browsingData permission is needed.

privacyLocalBody.message: All cleanup operations run entirely within your browser. No browsing data, cookies, history, or any other personal information is ever sent to external servers. The extension has no backend, no analytics, and no network calls.
privacyLocalBody.description: Explanation that all processing happens locally with no external communication.

privacyNoTrackBody.message: Klick Klean does not collect, transmit, or store any user data on external servers. There are no analytics, no tracking pixels, no third-party scripts, and no advertising. The extension operates entirely offline after installation.
privacyNoTrackBody.description: Explanation that no telemetry or tracking is used.

privacyAllowlistBody.message: Your allowlist (protected sites) is stored locally in Chrome's extension storage on your device. It is never synced to external servers. If you uninstall the extension, this data is removed automatically.
privacyAllowlistBody.description: Explanation of how allowlist data is stored locally.

privacyLimitationsBody.message: Some cleanup categories (like browsing history and downloads) can only be removed globally, not for specific sites. Chrome does not report how many items were actually deleted. Incognito data can only be affected if the extension is enabled for incognito mode. Some deprecated data types (AppCache, WebSQL) are no longer supported by Chrome.
privacyLimitationsBody.description: Explanation of known Chrome API limitations.

presetLabelQuickPrivacy.description: Label for the Quick privacy clean preset.

presetLabelFixBrokenSite.description: Label for the Fix broken website preset.

presetLabelLogoutEverywhere.description: Label for the Log out everywhere preset.

presetLabelStorageReset.description: Label for the Storage reset preset.

presetLabelDevResetCurrentSite.description: Label for the Developer reset for current site preset.

presetLabelFullWipe.description: Label for the Full wipe preset.

previewSelectedCategories.description: Label for the number of selected cleanup categories in preview.

previewScope.description: Label for the cleanup scope in preview.

previewRange.description: Label for the time range in preview.

previewAllowlistApplies.message: Allowlist applies to $1 of $2 selected categories.
previewAllowlistApplies.description: Note shown when allowlist is applicable to some selected categories.

previewAllowlistIgnored.message: Allowlist is ignored for scoped cleanup.
previewAllowlistIgnored.description: Note shown when allowlist is ignored because scope is not global.

presetDescQuickPrivacy.message: Clears recent history, cookies, cache, downloads, and form data from the last 24 hours. You may be signed out of some websites.
presetDescQuickPrivacy.description: Description for the Quick privacy clean preset.

presetDescFixBrokenSite.message: Resets storage and cache for the current site only. May fix loading or behavior issues. You will be signed out of this site.
presetDescFixBrokenSite.description: Description for the Fix broken website preset.

presetDescLogoutEverywhere.message: Removes all cookies globally. You will be signed out of all websites. This does not remove browsing history or cached files.
presetDescLogoutEverywhere.description: Description for the Log out everywhere preset.

presetDescStorageReset.message: Removes all website storage globally including cache, localStorage, IndexedDB, and service workers. Web apps may lose offline data and need to reload.
presetDescStorageReset.description: Description for the Storage reset preset.

presetDescDevReset.message: Developer-focused reset for the current site. Clears all storage, cache, service workers, and cookies for the active site only. Useful for debugging web applications.
presetDescDevReset.description: Description for the Developer reset for current site preset.

presetDescFullWipe.message: Removes all supported browsing data types globally. This is the most destructive option. Expert mode only. You will be signed out of all sites and lose all local web app data.
presetDescFullWipe.description: Description for the Full wipe preset.

warnWebSQLDeprecated.message: WebSQL has been removed from Chrome. Selecting this option will have no effect.
warnWebSQLDeprecated.description: Warning shown when WebSQL cleanup option is selected, noting it is deprecated.

popupSavePrefs.description: Label for popup button that saves current preferences.

popupShortcutHint.description: Keyboard shortcut hint shown in popup header.

popupStatusCancelled.message: Cleanup cancelled. No data was removed.
popupStatusCancelled.description: Popup status text when user cancels cleanup.

popupStatusIdle.description: Initial popup status text before user action.

popupStatusNeedsConfirm.message: Review high-risk actions and confirm before cleaning.
popupStatusNeedsConfirm.description: Status shown before user confirms destructive cleanup.

popupStatusRunning.description: Popup status text while cleanup is in progress.

popupSubtitle.message: Review selected cleanup categories, then confirm before deleting data.
popupSubtitle.description: Instructional subtitle shown in the popup.

popupTitle.description: Main heading in the popup UI.

shortcutChangeCta.description: CTA button label to open Chrome keyboard shortcut settings.

shortcutCurrentLabel.description: Shows the currently assigned command shortcut. $1 is the shortcut value.

shortcutFallbackInstruction.message: If the shortcuts editor did not open, use Extensions page > Keyboard shortcuts to change it.
shortcutFallbackInstruction.description: Shown when direct shortcut editor navigation is unavailable.

shortcutNotSet.description: Shown when no shortcut is assigned.

skipToContent.description: Skip link text for keyboard users to jump to main content.

tabsClosedResult.message: Browser windows and tabs were closed as requested.
tabsClosedResult.description: Result detail shown when the tabs/windows cleanup option succeeds.

timeRangeAllTime.description: Label for all time range option.

timeRangeCustom.description: Label for custom time range option.

timeRangeLast24Hours.description: Label for last 24 hours time range option.

timeRangeLast4Weeks.description: Label for last 4 weeks time range option.

timeRangeLast7Days.description: Label for last 7 days time range option.

timeRangeLastHour.description: Label for last hour time range option.

version.description: Displayed extension version on onboarding page.

warnAppcache.message: Application Cache (AppCache) has been removed from Chrome. Selecting this option will have no effect.
warnAppcache.description: Warning shown when appcache cleanup option is selected, noting it is deprecated.

warnCache.message: This clears cached files. Websites may load more slowly temporarily after cache is cleared.
warnCache.description: Warning shown when cache cleanup option is selected.

warnCacheStorage.message: This removes website Cache Storage data used by web apps and service workers. Offline functionality may stop working until sites reload data.
warnCacheStorage.description: Warning shown when Cache Storage cleanup option is selected.

warnCookies.message: This removes cookies and site data. You may be signed out of websites, and website preferences or sessions may reset.
warnCookies.description: Warning shown when cookies cleanup option is selected.

warnDownloads.message: This clears the downloads list/history. It does not necessarily delete downloaded files from your computer.
warnDownloads.description: Warning shown when downloads history cleanup option is selected.

warnFileSystems.message: This removes website file system data. Locally stored website files or offline app data may be lost.
warnFileSystems.description: Warning shown when file systems cleanup option is selected.

warnFormData.message: This removes saved autofill/form entries. You may lose saved form suggestions.
warnFormData.description: Warning shown when form data cleanup option is selected.

warnHistory.message: This removes browsing history records from Chrome. Deleted history may not be recoverable from the browser. Synced history behavior depends on your Chrome sync settings.
warnHistory.description: Warning shown when browsing history cleanup option is selected.

warnIndexedDB.message: This removes IndexedDB databases used by websites and web apps. Offline data, drafts, or locally stored app content may be lost.
warnIndexedDB.description: Warning shown when IndexedDB cleanup option is selected.

warnLocalStorage.message: This removes localStorage data saved by websites. Preferences, local sessions, drafts, or app state may be lost.
warnLocalStorage.description: Warning shown when localStorage cleanup option is selected.

warnServiceWorkers.message: This removes service worker data where supported. Offline behavior, push behavior, and cached web app behavior may reset until websites re-register workers.
warnServiceWorkers.description: Warning shown when service workers cleanup option is selected.

warnTabs.message: This will close open browser windows and tabs. Unsaved work may be lost. Incognito windows and tabs can only be affected if the extension is allowed in incognito mode. This action cannot be automatically undone.
warnTabs.description: Warning shown when tabs/windows cleanup option is selected.

warnWebSQL.message: This removes WebSQL data used by older websites. Some older web apps may lose locally stored data.
warnWebSQL.description: Warning shown when WebSQL cleanup option is selected.

welcomeContactLabel.description: Label prefix before support contact email on onboarding page.

welcomeDocumentTitle.description: Document title for the onboarding page shown on install.

welcomeHowTo.description: Section heading for onboarding usage steps.

welcomeIncognito.message: Incognito note: Chrome extensions cannot affect incognito data unless you explicitly enable this extension for incognito in chrome://extensions.

welcomeIntro.message: Klick Klean helps you quickly remove selected browsing data from Chrome.

welcomeNextSteps.description: Heading for onboarding next actions section.

welcomeOpenSettings.description: CTA label to open options from onboarding.

welcomeOpenShortcuts.description: CTA label to open chrome://extensions from onboarding.

welcomePermanent.message: Warning: cleanup actions may permanently delete browser data and may not be recoverable.

welcomeStep1.message: 1. Click the Klick Klean extension icon.

welcomeStep2.message: 2. Select the data types to clean.

welcomeStep5.message: 5. Some data may not be removable depending on Chrome permissions, active sessions, incognito restrictions, and site/browser policies.
welcomeStep5.description: Onboarding step 5 covering possible cleanup limits.

welcomeVersionLabel.description: Label prefix before version value on onboarding page.
